requirement_topic.en: Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity — GOST-TR Product Conformity Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 塔吉克标准局合格证书——GOST-TR产品合格框架
requirement_topic.zht: 塔吉克標準局合格證書——GOST-TR產品合格框架

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices imported into Tajikistan must hold a Certificate of Conformity issued by a body accredited by Tajikstandart (the National Standards Body of Tajikistan, also referred to as Gosstandart Tajikistan). Tajikistan uses a national standards system designated GOST-TR (Tajik state standards, TR prefix) that largely mirrors GOST-R (Russia), IEC, and ISO standards. The certificate must be issued by a Tajikstandart-accredited conformity assessment body and covers the full product scope including radio, EMC, electrical safety, and general product safety requirements. Tajikistan is a CIS member, and the CIS Mutual Recognition Agreement (MRA) on conformity assessment partially applies — certificates from some CIS accredited bodies may be recognised under bilateral or multilateral arrangements, but this recognition is not automatic and must be verified for each product category. Tajikistan is NOT in the EAEU — EAC certificates and declarations are not valid for market access in Tajikistan.
summary.zh: 进口到塔吉克斯坦的无线及物联网设备须持有由塔吉克标准局（塔吉克斯坦国家标准机构，又称Gosstandart Tajikistan）认可机构颁发的合格证书。塔吉克斯坦采用GOST-TR（塔吉克国家标准，TR前缀）国家标准体系，该体系在很大程度上参照GOST-R（俄罗斯）、IEC及ISO标准。证书须由塔吉克标准局认可的合格评定机构颁发，涵盖无线电、电磁兼容、电气安全及一般产品安全要求在内的完整产品范围。塔吉克斯坦是独联体成员，独联体合格评定互认协议（MRA）部分适用——部分独联体认可机构颁发的证书可在双边或多边安排下获得承认，但该承认并非自动生效，须针对每个产品类别逐一核实。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员国——EAC证书和声明在塔吉克斯坦无效。
summary.zht: 進口到塔吉克斯坦的無線及物聯網設備須持有由塔吉克標準局（塔吉克斯坦國家標準機構，又稱Gosstandart Tajikistan）認可機構頒發的合格證書。塔吉克斯坦採用GOST-TR（塔吉克國家標準，TR前綴）國家標準體系，該體系在很大程度上參照GOST-R（俄羅斯）、IEC及ISO標準。證書須由塔吉克標準局認可的合格評定機構頒發，涵蓋無線電、電磁相容、電氣安全及一般產品安全要求在內的完整產品範圍。塔吉克斯坦是獨聯體成員，獨聯體合格評定互認協議（MRA）部分適用——部分獨聯體認可機構頒發的證書可在雙邊或多邊安排下獲得承認，但該承認並非自動生效，須針對每個產品類別逐一核實。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員國——EAC證書和聲明在塔吉克斯坦無效。

standards_or_laws: Law of the Republic of Tajikistan No. 341 'On Technical Regulation' (as amended) — legal basis for mandatory conformity assessment
Tajikstandart — Committee for Standards, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection of the Republic of Tajikistan — national standards and conformity assessment authority
GOST-TR standards (TR prefix) — Tajik national standards mirroring GOST-R, IEC, and ISO frameworks
CIS Agreement on Conformity Assessment Mutual Recognition — partial application for CIS member state accredited body certificates

summary.en: Wireless devices sold in China must obtain CCC (China Compulsory Certification) issued by China Quality Certification Centre (CQC) or other CNCA-designated bodies. CCC covers electromagnetic compatibility (EMC), electrical safety, and radio requirements for applicable product categories. CCC certificates and Chinese test reports to GB standards are not recognised by Tajikstandart and cannot substitute for a Tajik Certificate of Conformity. The CIS MRA does not extend to Chinese certification bodies. A dedicated Tajik conformity certificate from a Tajikstandart-accredited body must be obtained.
summary.zh: 在中国销售的无线设备须取得由中国质量认证中心（CQC）或其他国家认证认可监督管理委员会指定机构颁发的CCC（中国强制认证）。CCC涵盖适用产品类别的电磁兼容（EMC）、电气安全及无线电要求。CCC证书和依据GB标准出具的中国测试报告不被塔吉克标准局承认，不可替代塔吉克合格证书。独联体互认协议不延伸至中国认证机构。须从塔吉克标准局认可机构取得专项塔吉克合格证书。
summary.zht: 在中國銷售的無線設備須取得由中國質量認證中心（CQC）或其他國家認證認可監督管理委員會指定機構頒發的CCC（中國強制認證）。CCC涵蓋適用產品類別的電磁相容（EMC）、電氣安全及無線電要求。CCC證書和依據GB標準出具的中國測試報告不被塔吉克標準局承認，不可替代塔吉克合格證書。獨聯體互認協議不延伸至中國認證機構。須從塔吉克標準局認可機構取得專項塔吉克合格證書。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China)
CQC — China Quality Certification Centre, primary CCC issuing body
GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment
GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement

gap.en: Chinese CCC certification and test reports to GB standards are not recognised by Tajikstandart and cannot substitute for a Tajik Certificate of Conformity. A dedicated application must be made to a Tajikstandart-accredited conformity assessment body. The CIS MRA provides partial mutual recognition between CIS member states only — China is not a CIS member, so this route is not available to Chinese exporters. Tajikistan is not in the EAEU, so EAC certificates provide no benefit. Some Russian-accredited laboratory test data (GOST-R / IEC) may be leveraged in support of a Tajik certificate application due to the GOST-TR mirror relationship, but this must be confirmed with the specific accredited body. Exporters should work with a Tajik-registered importer who can engage local accredited conformity assessment bodies.
gap.zh: 中国CCC认证及依据GB标准出具的测试报告不被塔吉克标准局承认，不可替代塔吉克合格证书。须向塔吉克标准局认可的合格评定机构单独提出申请。独联体互认协议仅在独联体成员国之间提供部分互认——中国非独联体成员国，因此该途径对中国出口商不适用。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员国，因此EAC证书不提供任何优势。由于GOST-TR与GOST-R的镜像关系，部分俄罗斯认可实验室的测试数据（GOST-R / IEC）可在申请塔吉克证书时作为支撑材料，但须与具体认可机构确认。出口商应与已注册的塔吉克进口商合作，以便接触当地认可的合格评定机构。
gap.zht: 中國CCC認證及依據GB標準出具的測試報告不被塔吉克標準局承認，不可替代塔吉克合格證書。須向塔吉克標準局認可的合格評定機構單獨提出申請。獨聯體互認協議僅在獨聯體成員國之間提供部分互認——中國非獨聯體成員國，因此該途徑對中國出口商不適用。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員國，因此EAC證書不提供任何優勢。由於GOST-TR與GOST-R的鏡像關係，部分俄羅斯認可實驗室的測試數據（GOST-R / IEC）可在申請塔吉克證書時作為支撐材料，但須與具體認可機構確認。出口商應與已註冊的塔吉克進口商合作，以便接觸當地認可的合格評定機構。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Certificate of Conformity from a Tajikstandart-accredited body required for wireless and IoT devices imported and sold in Tajikistan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (China Compulsory Certification) required for applicable wireless device categories sold in China

source.publisher: Tajikstandart — Committee for Standards, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection of the Republic of Tajikistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity from an accredited body is mandatory for wireless and IoT devices entering Tajikistan. Chinese CCC is not recognised. Tajikistan is outside the EAEU — EAC certificates have no standing. The CIS MRA applies only to CIS member states, not China. Exporters must engage a Tajikstandart-accredited conformity assessment body, typically working through a locally registered Tajik importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入塔吉克斯坦的无线及物联网设备，强制要求提供由认可机构颁发的塔吉克标准局合格证书。中国CCC不被承认。塔吉克斯坦位于EAEU之外——EAC证书不具效力。独联体互认协议仅适用于独联体成员国，不适用于中国。出口商须与塔吉克标准局认可的合格评定机构合作，通常须通过已在当地注册的塔吉克进口商进行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入塔吉克斯坦的無線及物聯網設備，強制要求提供由認可機構頒發的塔吉克標準局合格證書。中國CCC不被承認。塔吉克斯坦位於EAEU之外——EAC證書不具效力。獨聯體互認協議僅適用於獨聯體成員國，不適用於中國。出口商須與塔吉克標準局認可的合格評定機構合作，通常須通過已在當地註冊的塔吉克進口商進行。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing — GOST-TR / IEC CISPR Standards under Tajikstandart Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容测试——塔吉克标准局框架下GOST-TR / IEC CISPR标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容測試——塔吉克標準局框架下GOST-TR / IEC CISPR標準

summary.en: Wireless and electronic devices sold in Tajikistan must meet electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements as part of the Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity process. EMC requirements are specified under GOST-TR standards that mirror GOST-R equivalents of IEC CISPR standards (primarily CISPR 32 for multimedia equipment emissions, CISPR 35 for multimedia equipment immunity, and IEC 61000-series for general EMC). Testing must be performed by a laboratory accredited under the Tajikstandart framework. Russian-language EMC test documentation is generally accepted. Due to the GOST-TR / GOST-R alignment, EMC test reports generated by Russian GOST-R-accredited laboratories may be acceptable in support of a Tajikstandart certificate application, subject to confirmation by the certifying body. Importers should verify the current list of accepted laboratories with Tajikstandart before commissioning tests.
summary.zh: 在塔吉克斯坦销售的无线及电子设备，须在取得塔吉克标准局合格证书的过程中满足电磁兼容（EMC）要求。EMC要求依据GOST-TR标准规定，该标准参照GOST-R对IEC CISPR标准的等效版本（主要为针对多媒体设备辐射的CISPR 32、针对多媒体设备抗扰度的CISPR 35，以及IEC 61000系列通用EMC标准）。测试须由塔吉克标准局框架下认可的实验室执行。俄语EMC测试文件一般可被接受。由于GOST-TR与GOST-R的对应关系，由俄罗斯GOST-R认可实验室出具的EMC测试报告，在取得认证机构确认后，可作为塔吉克标准局证书申请的支撑材料。进口商在委托测试前，应向塔吉克标准局核实当前认可实验室名单。
summary.zht: 在塔吉克斯坦銷售的無線及電子設備，須在取得塔吉克標準局合格證書的過程中滿足電磁相容（EMC）要求。EMC要求依據GOST-TR標準規定，該標準參照GOST-R對IEC CISPR標準的等效版本（主要為針對多媒體設備輻射的CISPR 32、針對多媒體設備抗擾度的CISPR 35，以及IEC 61000系列通用EMC標準）。測試須由塔吉克標準局框架下認可的實驗室執行。俄語EMC測試文件一般可被接受。由於GOST-TR與GOST-R的對應關係，由俄羅斯GOST-R認可實驗室出具的EMC測試報告，在取得認證機構確認後，可作為塔吉克標準局證書申請的支撐材料。進口商在委託測試前，應向塔吉克標準局核實當前認可實驗室名單。

standards_or_laws: GOST-TR EMC standards — Tajik national standards mirroring GOST-R IEC CISPR equivalents (CISPR 32, CISPR 35, IEC 61000 series)
CISPR 32 — Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements (Tajik GOST-TR equivalent)
CISPR 35 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (Tajik GOST-TR equivalent)
IEC 61000-series — Electromagnetic compatibility — General EMC limits and measurement methods (Tajik GOST-TR equivalent)

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices must meet EMC requirements under the CCC scheme, primarily tested against GB/T 9254 (information technology equipment radio disturbance) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions). Chinese EMC test reports to GB/T 9254 and related standards are not directly recognised by Tajikstandart. However, because Chinese GB EMC standards partially align with IEC CISPR standards, some test data may be usable as supporting information in a Tajik certificate application, but this does not eliminate the need for a formal Tajikstandart-framework EMC assessment.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须满足CCC体系下的EMC要求，主要依据GB/T 9254（信息技术设备无线电骚扰）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流限值）进行测试。依据GB/T 9254及相关标准出具的中国EMC测试报告不被塔吉克标准局直接承认。但由于中国GB EMC标准与IEC CISPR标准部分对应，部分测试数据可作为塔吉克合格证书申请的支撑信息，但不能免除正式塔吉克标准局框架下EMC评估的要求。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須滿足CCC體系下的EMC要求，主要依據GB/T 9254（信息技術設備無線電騷擾）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流限值）進行測試。依據GB/T 9254及相關標準出具的中國EMC測試報告不被塔吉克標準局直接承認。但由於中國GB EMC標準與IEC CISPR標準部分對應，部分測試數據可作為塔吉克合格證書申請的支撐信息，但不能免除正式塔吉克標準局框架下EMC評估的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (China CCC EMC standard, aligned with CISPR 32)
GB 17625.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits — Limits for harmonic current emissions
GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement

gap.en: Chinese GB-standard EMC test reports are not directly accepted by Tajikstandart. A formal EMC assessment under the GOST-TR / IEC CISPR framework by a Tajikstandart-accepted laboratory is required as part of the Certificate of Conformity process. Due to the GOST-TR alignment with GOST-R and IEC CISPR, Russian-accredited laboratory EMC test reports may partially support the application, but this must be pre-confirmed with the certifying body. Chinese CCC EMC test data may be referenced as supporting documentation only. The practical compliance path for Chinese exporters is to work with a Tajik importer who engages a recognized local or Russian-accredited EMC laboratory with experience in GOST-TR submissions.
gap.zh: 中国GB标准EMC测试报告不被塔吉克标准局直接接受。须在取得合格证书的过程中，由塔吉克标准局认可的实验室依据GOST-TR / IEC CISPR框架进行正式EMC评估。由于GOST-TR与GOST-R及IEC CISPR的对应关系，俄罗斯认可实验室的EMC测试报告可能部分支撑申请，但须事先与认证机构确认。中国CCC EMC测试数据仅可作为支撑性参考文件。中国出口商的实际合规路径是与塔吉克进口商合作，由其委托具有GOST-TR申报经验的当地或俄罗斯认可EMC实验室。
gap.zht: 中國GB標準EMC測試報告不被塔吉克標準局直接接受。須在取得合格證書的過程中，由塔吉克標準局認可的實驗室依據GOST-TR / IEC CISPR框架進行正式EMC評估。由於GOST-TR與GOST-R及IEC CISPR的對應關係，俄羅斯認可實驗室的EMC測試報告可能部分支撐申請，但須事先與認證機構確認。中國CCC EMC測試數據僅可作為支撐性參考文件。中國出口商的實際合規路徑是與塔吉克進口商合作，由其委託具有GOST-TR申報經驗的當地或俄羅斯認可EMC實驗室。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC testing per GOST-TR / IEC CISPR standards required as part of the Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity for wireless and electronic devices
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC testing per GB/T 9254 and related standards required under CCC for applicable wireless and IT equipment sold in China

source.publisher: Tajikstandart — Committee for Standards, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection of the Republic of Tajikistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC testing under the GOST-TR / IEC CISPR framework is a mandatory component of the Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity for wireless devices. Chinese GB-standard EMC reports are not directly recognised. Russian GOST-R-accredited laboratory reports may partially support an application due to the GOST-TR / GOST-R alignment, but must be pre-confirmed with the certifying body. Exporters should work through a Tajik importer to engage an appropriate accredited laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GOST-TR / IEC CISPR框架下的EMC测试是无线设备取得塔吉克标准局合格证书的强制组成部分。中国GB标准EMC报告不被直接承认。俄罗斯GOST-R认可实验室的报告因GOST-TR / GOST-R的对应关系，可能部分支撑申请，但须事先与认证机构确认。出口商应通过塔吉克进口商委托合适的认可实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GOST-TR / IEC CISPR框架下的EMC測試是無線設備取得塔吉克標準局合格證書的強制組成部分。中國GB標準EMC報告不被直接承認。俄羅斯GOST-R認可實驗室的報告因GOST-TR / GOST-R的對應關係，可能部分支撐申請，但須事先與認證機構確認。出口商應通過塔吉克進口商委託合適的認可實驗室。
